## Fix Value

Restore [intended functionality]
so that [the user is no longer blocked/confused].

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] [e.g., Bug is no longer reproducible]
- [ ] [e.g., Expected behavior: Describe what should happen instead]
- [ ] [e.g., Regression check: The fix did not break anything else]
